description: Set up the monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces, configure the Express backend with TypeScript, SQLite database, JWT authentication (login/register), and tier system. This is the foundational backend that everything else builds on.
steps: Create root package.json with pnpm workspaces pointing to ['server', 'client']. Add root scripts for dev, build, test.

Create server/package.json with dependencies: express, cors, helmet, jsonwebtoken, bcryptjs, better-sqlite3, dotenv, baileys (^7.0.0-rc13), baileys-antiban (^3.9.0), express-rate-limit, uuid. DevDeps: typescript, @types/express, @types/cors, @types/jsonwebtoken, @types/bcryptjs, @types/better-sqlite3, @types/uuid, tsx, jest, @types/jest, ts-jest.
Create server/tsconfig.json targeting ES2022, module NodeNext, outDir ./dist, rootDir ./src, strict mode.

Create server/src/db/schema.ts - Initialize SQLite database with better-sqlite3. Tables: users (id, email, password_hash, name, tier, created_at, updated_at), whatsapp_sessions (id, user_id, phone_number, status, session_data_path, created_at, last_connected), api_keys (id, user_id, key, created_at, last_used). Tier enum: 'free', 'pro', 'enterprise'. Add tier_limits table with columns: tier, max_numbers, max_requests_per_day.
Create server/src/db/index.ts - Export db instance, run migrations on first load. Seed tier_limits: free(1 number, 100 req/day), pro(5 numbers, 5000 req/day), enterprise(20 numbers, 50000 req/day).
Create server/src/middleware/auth.ts - JWT verification middleware. Extract token from Authorization header, verify with secret, attach user to request.
Create server/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts - Rate limiting middleware that checks user tier against their daily request count. Track usage in a request_log table or in-memory counter.
Create server/src/services/auth.service.ts - Functions: registerUser(email, password, name), loginUser(email, password), getUserById(id). Passwords hashed with bcryptjs. Returns JWT token on success.
Create server/src/routes/auth.ts - POST /api/auth/register (email, password, name), POST /api/auth/login (email, password), GET /api/auth/me (protected, returns user info with tier).
Create server/src/routes/api-keys.ts - POST /api/keys (generate new API key), GET /api/keys (list user's keys), DELETE /api/keys/:id (revoke key).
Create server/src/index.ts - Express app setup: cors, helmet, json body parser, mount auth routes, mount api-key routes. Listen on PORT from env (default 3001). Error handling middleware.
Create .env.example with: PORT=3001, JWT_SECRET=change-me-in-production, DATABASE_PATH=./data/gateway.db, SESSION_PATH=./sessions.
Create server/src/types/index.ts - Type definitions: User, WhatsAppSession, ApiKey, TierLimits, AuthRequest (extends Express Request).
acceptance_criteria: Running pnpm install at root installs all dependencies for server workspace
Running pnpm --filter server run build compiles TypeScript without errors
The SQLite database is created on first run with all required tables
POST /api/auth/register creates a new user and returns a JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns a JWT token
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info including tier
Rate limiting middleware correctly limits requests based on tier
findings: pnpm 10.28.1 requires onlyBuiltDependencies in root package.json for better-sqlite3 and esbuild native builds. jest.config must be .js (not .ts) unless ts-node is installed. ts-jest needs isolatedModules:true in tsconfig override for NodeNext module resolution. Removed declaration/declarationMap from tsconfig to avoid complex type inference errors with pnpm hoisting.
